content.body: and yet it shows current time zones for locations and not what time zone it will be in april 😅
I mean, we're going to be meeting every week for a year
depending on how we schedule it, it's going to shift an hour for some people
Yes but I prefer to schedule based on how the alignment will be 95% of the time
And not based on the 4 or so week per year where US and Europe are not aligned
I wonder how difficult it is to build a tool like this in google sheets
